# LuisInstaTelegram configuration
# Copy this file to config.txt and replace the placeholders.
# Never commit config.txt.

# Required: token generated by @BotFather
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=123456789:REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_REAL_TOKEN

# Optional but recommended: comma-separated list of allowed chat IDs.
# Leave empty while testing if you want the bot to reply to any chat.
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHAT_IDS=

# Optional but recommended: webhook secret sent by Telegram in
# X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token. Use the same value in setWebhook.
TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET=change-me-to-a-long-random-string

# Optional: external service used to resolve/download Instagram media.
# The bot works without this, but will only extract and report the shortcode.
THIRD_PARTY_API_URL=
THIRD_PARTY_API_KEY=

# Runtime
APP_DEBUG=false
APP_LOG_FILE=../storage/bot.log
